cast.name: 杰西卡·布朗·芬德利 Jessica Brown Findlay

introduction: After his involvement in a tax fraud case, Tunisian man Hicham was imprisoned then deported from the UK. Despite his innocence, the court case led to his divorce from his British wife, Emily, and as a result, Hicham hasn’t seen his daughter, Sophia, for five years.Emily wants Sophia, now 6 years old, to know her father. She agrees to travel to Tunisia, though tells her father, influential businessman Anthony, that she's simply attending the wedding of her friend, Ines and promises not to see Hicham. Emily knows that her father would object to her travelling if he knew the real reason as he's always been against his daughter marrying a Tunisian/Muslim man.In Tunis, Sophia gets to know her father, though Emily still keeps her distance from Hicham. Just when things are going well between father and daughter, the unimaginable happens - Sophia is kidnapped from under Hicham's nose.Despite pleading his innocence, the authorities won't believe Hicham's version of events. Due to his dubious past and his erratic behaviour, he's arrested in suspicion of kidnapping his own daughter. Hicham is forced into a solitary journey to find Sophia and clear his name.
